title: "Figure 1E Epithelial Pseudotime"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-21"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(Seurat)
library(SeuratWrappers)
library(monocle3)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(igraph)

# Integrated Harmony-corrected and Azimuth-annotated Seurat object
lungQuery <- readRDS("path_to_object/lungQuery_After_Az_Normalized.rds")
DefaultAssay(lungQuery) <- "RNA"

outdir <- "Figure1E_Epithelial_Pseudotime_Output"
dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Define developmental stage used for Figure 1E
lungQuery$Stage <- dplyr::case_when(
  lungQuery$Donor_Group %in% c("PT_NEWBORN", "PT-NEWBORN", "PT_NB") ~ "Saccular",
  lungQuery$Donor_Group %in% c("FT_NEWBORN", "FT-NEWBORN", "FT_NB") ~ "Alveolar",
  TRUE ~ NA_character_
)

lungQuery$Stage <- factor(lungQuery$Stage, levels = c("Saccular", "Alveolar"))

epithelial_types <- c(
  "AT2",
  "AT2 proliferating",
  "AT1",
  "Transitional Club-AT2"
)

epi_dev <- subset(
  lungQuery,
  subset = Stage %in% c("Saccular", "Alveolar") &
    predicted.ann_finest_level %in% epithelial_types
)

epi_dev$predicted.ann_finest_level <- factor(
  epi_dev$predicted.ann_finest_level,
  levels = epithelial_types
)

table(epi_dev$Stage)
table(epi_dev$predicted.ann_finest_level)

get_root_AT2 <- function(cds, root_cell_type = "AT2") {
  
  cell_ids <- colnames(cds)[
    colData(cds)$predicted.ann_finest_level == root_cell_type
  ]
  
  closest_vertex <- cds@principal_graph_aux[["UMAP"]]$pr_graph_cell_proj_closest_vertex
  closest_vertex <- as.matrix(closest_vertex)
  closest_vertex <- closest_vertex[colnames(cds), , drop = FALSE]
  
  root_vertex <- names(which.max(table(closest_vertex[cell_ids, 1])))
  
  root_pr_node <- igraph::V(principal_graph(cds)[["UMAP"]])$name[
    as.numeric(root_vertex)
  ]
  
  return(root_pr_node)
}

run_epi_pseudotime <- function(seurat_obj, stage_name) {
  
  obj_stage <- subset(seurat_obj, subset = Stage == stage_name)
  Idents(obj_stage) <- "predicted.ann_finest_level"
  
  cds_stage <- as.cell_data_set(obj_stage)
  
  rowData(cds_stage)$gene_name <- rownames(cds_stage)
  rowData(cds_stage)$gene_short_name <- rownames(cds_stage)
  
  cds_stage@int_colData@listData$reducedDims$UMAP <-
    obj_stage@reductions$umap@cell.embeddings
  
  cds_stage <- cluster_cells(cds_stage, reduction_method = "UMAP")
  
  recreate.partition <- c(rep(1, ncol(cds_stage)))
  names(recreate.partition) <- colnames(cds_stage)
  cds_stage@clusters$UMAP$partitions <- as.factor(recreate.partition)
  
  cds_stage <- learn_graph(
    cds_stage,
    use_partition = FALSE,
    close_loop = FALSE
  )
  
  root_node <- get_root_AT2(
    cds_stage,
    root_cell_type = "AT2"
  )
  
  cds_stage <- order_cells(
    cds_stage,
    reduction_method = "UMAP",
    root_pr_nodes = root_node
  )
  
  colData(cds_stage)$monocle3_pseudotime <- pseudotime(cds_stage)
  
  p <- plot_cells(
    cds_stage,
    color_cells_by = "pseudotime",
    label_cell_groups = FALSE,
    label_groups_by_cluster = FALSE,
    label_leaves = FALSE,
    label_branch_points = FALSE,
    label_roots = FALSE
  ) +
    ggtitle(paste(stage_name, "epithelial pseudotime")) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14)
  
  return(list(cds = cds_stage, plot = p))
}

saccular_epi <- run_epi_pseudotime(epi_dev, "Saccular")
alveolar_epi <- run_epi_pseudotime(epi_dev, "Alveolar")

p_saccular_epi <- saccular_epi$plot
p_alveolar_epi <- alveolar_epi$plot

p_saccular_epi
p_alveolar_epi

ggsave(
  file.path(outdir, "Saccular_Epithelial_Pseudotime.png"),
  p_saccular_epi,
  width = 7,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

ggsave(
  file.path(outdir, "Alveolar_Epithelial_Pseudotime.png"),
  p_alveolar_epi,
  width = 7,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

write.csv(
  as.data.frame(colData(saccular_epi$cds)),
  file.path(outdir, "Saccular_Epithelial_Pseudotime_Metadata.csv"),
  row.names = TRUE
)

write.csv(
  as.data.frame(colData(alveolar_epi$cds)),
  file.path(outdir, "Alveolar_Epithelial_Pseudotime_Metadata.csv"),
  row.names = TRUE
)
